subcodes.first_line: Mention from Our presence unto her whose son attained unto the presence time after time and hearkened unto the call of God when he appeared therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للتی فاز ابنها بالحضور مره بعد مره و سمع ندآء الله اذ حضر فی هذا
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
